title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: Anthropologists studying remote cultures have uncovered surprising variations in how societies perceive time. example.explanation: “Believed” is the appropriate verb for early academic assumptions.
